---
title: SNC
subtitle: "loani: לא אני לא sonderzeichentest" 
format: html
---


## snc
### 16143.1 
- trigger wf
- site 004
- wf cp -ar to copy site-libs
- ls output: chk libs.
- with new wf, rsync in image installed: no, --no-delete unknown
- t4, test on m12, wks.
- t5: site_libs was in ignore. rm.
- t6

### 16145.
- pdf/html conf in wolf wks. now try in qyml global wt assets, rm all child config.

### 16146.
- font georgia missing, installed in container.
- t1
- container success, t2
- missed output dir
- DCLX template wks.
- m12: pull > render play/pages, chk.o
- m9
- invalid date? didnt render?
- wo format but still i. date
- wt sys.date()
